message:
fix(fcp-cbor): cap canonicalize_map scratch buffer to prevent memory amplification br-2ot4f

A CBOR map with millions of tiny entries (fitting within 64 MiB input
limit) could trigger 512+ MiB scratch allocation via entries.len() * 32.
Cap at MAX_CANONICAL_OBJECT_BYTES since serialized keys cannot exceed
the input size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
